ChatRoom.title: Chat Room
ChatRoom.description: Represents the permanent private chat room

members.description: Map of active user IDs to their usernames (user1 or user2)

ChatMessage.title: Chat Message
ChatMessage.description: A single message in the chat room

sender.description: The sender username (user1, user2, or SYSTEM)

timestamp.description: Firestore server timestamp of when the message was sent

SecurityConfig.title: Security Configuration
SecurityConfig.description: Stores the SHA-256 hash of the passphrase for secure login

passphraseHash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the passphrase

/chat/{roomCode}.description: Access point for the chat room

/config/security.description: Security config for comparing passphrase hashes
